blue_oceans.notes: 8.18M community across r/DIY (5.8M), r/HomeImprovement (2.1M), r/fixit (280K). Apps are marketplaces for hiring pros or shopping. No app gamifies the daily home DIY skill habit (one repair technique practiced, one tool skill drilled, one home improvement micro-task completed with logging) with streak XP, skill badges (plumbing, electrical, drywall, tiling), and homeowner level gates.

6.39M community across r/drawing (5.8M), r/learnart (410K), r/ArtFundamentals (180K). All apps are professional illustration tools — blank canvases without habit formation. No app gamifies the daily drawing practice habit (one gesture drawing, one value study, one anatomy drill) with streak XP, technique mastery badges, and artist level progression. DrawingTutorials101 and Drawabox are static web resources, not mobile streak apps.

5.03M community across r/digitalart (4.2M), r/DigitalPainting (420K), r/learnart (410K). Procreate and Clip Studio are professional tools. No app gamifies the daily digital art practice habit (one color theory study, one anatomy sketch, one lighting study) with streak XP, digital artist level progression, and technique mastery badges.

4.86M community across r/woodworking (4.2M), r/BeginnerWoodWorking (280K), r/handtools (380K). Apps are plan libraries and calculators. No app gamifies the daily woodworking habit (one joinery technique practiced, one hand tool drill completed, one project milestone logged) with streak XP, woodworking technique badges (dovetail, mortise-and-tenon, hand plane), and craftsman level gates.

4.68M community across r/electronics (2.9M), r/arduino (580K), r/raspberry_pi (1.2M). Apps are simulation tools and loggers. No app gamifies the daily electronics maker habit (one component studied, one circuit built on breadboard, one Arduino sketch written and tested) with streak XP, maker skill badges (resistors, transistors, microcontrollers, sensors), and engineer level progression.

2.90M community across r/3Dprinting (2.1M), r/functionalprint (420K), r/PrintedMinis (380K). Apps are printer control tools and model libraries. No app gamifies the daily 3D printing skill habit (one slicer setting optimized and logged, one print failure diagnosed, one design skill practiced in CAD) with streak XP, maker level gates, and technique badges (bed adhesion, support optimization, tolerance testing).

2.26M community across r/crochet (1.8M), r/BeginnerCrochet (280K), r/crochetpatterns (180K). No app gamifies the daily crochet habit (one stitch type practiced, one motif completed, one pattern row logged) with streak XP, technique mastery badges (granny square, amigurumi, Tunisian), and crocheter level progression.

1.67M community. Apps are design viewers and color organizers. No app gamifies the daily embroidery habit (one stitch type practiced — satin, French knot, chain — one design element completed, one pattern section logged) with streak XP, technique badges, and embroiderer level gates.

1.47M community. Apps are digital illustration tools — none address traditional watercolor skill building. No app gamifies the daily watercolor habit (one wet-on-wet technique practiced, one color mixing study completed, one composition painted) with streak XP, technique badges (wet-on-wet, granulation, lifting, blooms), and painter level gates.

1.39M community. Apps are pattern readers and row counters. No app gamifies the daily knitting habit (one new stitch practiced, one pattern row completed, one technique like short rows or cables drilled) with streak XP, technique badges, and knitter level gates. Ravelry is a social platform/marketplace, not a habit-building streak app.

1.18M community. No dedicated quality app exists for daily leathercraft skill building. No app gamifies the daily leathercraft habit (one cut technique practiced, one stitch type drilled — saddle stitch, cross stitch — one hardware application completed) with streak XP, leather technique badges, and craftsman level gates.

982K community. Apps are basic tracing tools or digital drawing toys. No app gamifies the daily calligraphy habit (one letterform drilled at 20x, one word composed, one script style studied — Copperplate, Spencerian, modern brush) with streak XP, script mastery badges, and penmanship level gates.

940K community. No dedicated resin art streak app exists. No app gamifies the daily resin art habit (one pigment mixing experiment, one mold fill completed, one technique variation tested — cells, alcohol ink, metallic pour) with streak XP, resin technique badges, and resin artist level gates.

878K community. No dedicated pottery streak app exists. No app gamifies the daily pottery habit (one centering drill, one cylinder pulled, one glaze technique tested) with streak XP, throwing technique badges (centering, pulling, trimming, glazing), and potter level gates.

742K community. No dedicated candle making app or streak tool exists. No app gamifies the daily candle making habit (one fragrance blend tested, one pour temperature varied and logged, one wick size tested) with streak XP, technique badges (fragrance load, cure time, wick selection), and chandler level gates.
